BIPIN SINGH

📊 Data Analyst 🐍 Python Developer 🧬 Biotech Student 📈 Power BI · Tableau

A Biotechnology student with a passion for Data Analytics, bridging life sciences with data-driven insights. Skilled in Python, SQL, Power BI and Tableau — focused on healthcare and bioinformatics analytics.

Profile · About Me

Who I Am

I am a Biotechnology student with a strong background in data analytics, skilled in Python (Pandas, NumPy), SQL, Power BI, Tableau, and Excel. I am passionate about extracting insights from complex datasets, especially in healthcare and life sciences.

I aim to contribute to data-driven innovation by bridging biotechnology with modern analytical tools — transforming raw biological and business data into actionable insights that drive real decisions.

Currently pursuing B.Tech Biotechnology at Lovely Professional University (2023–Present), I actively explore areas such as bioinformatics, biostatistics, and statistical data analysis, while developing hands-on experience through internships and projects in data analytics.
